src/team_agent/runtime.py.rationale: The 5-step + thin-facade refactor reduced runtime.py from ~3712 to 907 lines (-76%). Remaining 907 breaks down as: 429 lines explicit per-lane import blocks + import-time PUBLIC_NAMES assertion loops across 10 lanes (provider_cli, sessions, display, status, restart, coordinator, diagnose, approvals, launch, leader) — the cost of the explicit-import convention spark reviews endorsed throughout this slice; collapsing further via PEP 562 __getattr__ would lose inspect.signature compatibility, type-checker visibility, and import-time package-presence assertions. 79 lines _DELEGATE_MAP + PEP 562 proxy + 9 explicit-signature wrappers for symbols called unqualified in runtime.py or signature-checked in tests. 31 lines module-level constants pulled by callers. 368 lines genuine runtime concerns (run_cmd, ensure_workspace_dirs, _runtime_lock, _tmux helpers, _find_*) where further extraction has diminishing returns.
src/team_agent/runtime.py.review_trigger: Revisit if runtime.py exceeds 1000 lines OR the explicit-import convention is replaced team-wide.
